name: io.github.bg4ff8mtdn-dotcom/ownership-provenance-protocol
description: MCP protocol enforcing explicit task acceptance and mandatory provenance tags on completion claims. This is a reference deployment for testing and demonstration — it requires a bearer token only the maintainer holds, and does not offer public sign-up or shared access. To actually use this protocol, deploy your own copy: clone the repo, set your own MCP_ACCESS_TOKEN, and point your MCP client at your own instance. See the README for setup instructions.
